Case# CTLineBreakMode.byCharWrapping

iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
case byCharWrapping
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/ctlinebreakmode/bycharwrapping#Discussion)

Wrapping occurs before the first character that doesn’t fit.
